summary: Manifest Nodejs object includes only the 'Version' field; GenerateProfilerData is omitted.
decision: Per the dispatch briefing's guidance ('include GenerateProfilerData only if Stream Deck convention requires; otherwise just Version'), and per probe-windows-plugin-runtime which names Nodejs.Version as the load-bearing field, the Nodejs object is set to {Version:'20'} only. This matches MCA.TDIPA.4's expected_value '{Version: 20}' exactly. If the StreamDock host on the real Windows machine fails to launch the plugin and the host log reports a missing GenerateProfilerData, the field would be added as {Version:'20', GenerateProfilerData:false} — no other section impact.
nested_equivalent: Overseer would surface this; Coordinator would approve as a minimum-change-that-satisfies-the-MCA decision.
contract_impact: None. C-S1-S3 is preserved at the load-bearing 'main.js parses argv' clause; the Nodejs field is documentation of the implementation choice.
